message:
fix(freeze): guard cleanupLocals against use-after-free on unlinked GC objects

Check link.prev (offset 8 in JSGCObjectHeader) before decrementing
ref counts — if null, the object was already freed/unlinked from the
GC list. Also guard ref_count == 1 explicitly to skip already-invalid
objects with ref_count <= 0.

Fixes TypeError crash in frozen codegen where closure objects were
being double-freed during exception cleanup paths.
